architecture.summary: Add origin field to SkillInfo, detect via path prefix matching against AGENTS_REGISTRY localSkillsDir + hardcoded extras

integrations.summary: N/A - internal feature, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: Sidebar split into Your Skills/Installed sections, installed skills read-only with dimmed styling, info banner

performance.summary: N/A - trivial path string check per skill, no performance concern

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, no auth or data sensitivity

edge-cases.summary: Duplicate skills shown in both sections, plugins/cache/ marked installed not excluded
